bio: Soviet Shiksa is the solo project of Christopher Shawn, a Nashville-based artist who blends Southern Gothic storytelling with a dark, experimental sound. Emerging from the city's indie scene, Christopher channels his experiences from late-night horror films and satirical standup comedy to his time as a carnival barker and haunt performer into a unique musical expression he dubs “Nightmare Jazz.”

Happy Chichester is a singer-songwriter, multi-instrumentalist and producer from Columbus, OH who has performed sold out shows across the US and Europe to a cultish and dedicated fan-base.

He founded Howlin’ Maggie, co-founded the Royal Crescent Mob, and was an original member of the Twilight Singers. In addition to his own work, he has also written, performed and recorded with Brad, The Afghan Whigs, and Shawn Smith.


Happy Chichester's performance is presented by District614

band: PARTY IN THE FRONT PARTY IN THE BACK

bio: Brood X warps psych rock conventions to create tranced out, groove-gazing tracks. Dual vocals and earworm riffs weave in and out of torrential rhythm, locked in beats and wall of sound exploration. The ever-changing lineup experiments with texture, dimension, and their own stamina resulting in delirious live performances. Brood X will emerge from the ground on May 9th.
